mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BIOMETRIC_DEVICE (DEVICE_ID, USER_ID, PUBLIC_KEY_B64, STATUS, ENROLLED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{userId}, #{publicKeyBase64}, #{status, typeHandler=com.biometric.poc.mapper.handler.DeviceStatusTypeHandler}, #{enrolledAt, typeHandler=com.biometric.poc.mapper.handler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.biometric.poc.mapper.handler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BIOMETRIC_DEVICE WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
mapper.update: UPDATE BIOMETRIC_DEVICE SET PUBLIC_KEY_B64 = #{publicKeyBase64}, USER_ID = #{userId}, STATUS = 'ACTIVE', ENROLLED_AT = #{enrolledAt, typeHandler=com.biometric.poc.mapper.handler.InstantTypeHandler}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.biometric.poc.mapper.handler.InstantTypeHandler} WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
